texto: My mom was concerned that us four little black girls have a really well-balanced life. She wanted us to be around people like us, but we also went to private school and traveled all the time. Now I fit in most places because I've been most places.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kelis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “My mom was concerned that us four little black girls have a really well-balanced life. She wanted…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, vida, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e time.

frase_original: My mom was concerned that us four little black girls have a really well-balanced life. She wanted us to be around people like us, but we also went to private school and traveled all the time. Now I fit in most places because I've been most places.

texto: The key to sauces is having patience. I'm not a patient woman, but I learned with sauces that you have to get everything on a slow roll and layer the flavors. That's where you get robust tastes: it starts one way and ends another.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kelis sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “The key to sauces is having patience. I'm not a patient woman, but I learned with sauces that you…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, woman, slow, útil em momentos de termino e slow.

frase_original: The key to sauces is having patience. I'm not a patient woman, but I learned with sauces that you have to get everything on a slow roll and layer the flavors. That's where you get robust tastes: it starts one way and ends another.
